sourceList.title: Beatrice of Bohemia, "Find A Grave Index"
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - BEATRIX [Božena] ([1230/31]-Breslau 27 May 1290, bur Breslau Klarissenkloster).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - OTTO von Brandenburg m (before Jun 1243) BEATRIX [Božena] of Bohemia, daughter of WENZEL I King of Bohemia & his wife Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen ([1230/31]-Breslau 27 May 1290, bur Breslau Klarissenkloster).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix von Böhmen於1225年出生時，她的父親Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec20歲，母親Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen23歲。她於1243年與Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1290年5月27日在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福享年65歲，埋葬在波蘭萊瓦福斯吉波維亞特 萊瓦福斯吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix von Böhmen于1225年出生时，她的父亲Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec20岁，母亲Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen23岁。她于1243年与Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1290年5月27日在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福享年65岁，埋葬在波兰萊瓦福斯吉波維亞特 萊瓦福斯吉。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Böhmen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz.  French Andre, Marthe.
Swiss German: from a short form of the medieval personal name Liborius (see Bohr 1 and Liborio ). This surname is also found in France (mainly Marne).
Swedish (Bohrén): ornamental name from Bohr 3 + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin enius ‘relating to’.

variants.name: Bohr
meanings: German: from a short form of the medieval personal name Liborius (see Liborio ), the name of the patron saint of the city of Paderborn.
Germanized form of Sorbian Bór or other Slavic Bor .
Danish and Swedish: from North German   Bahr   ‘bear’.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix von Böhmen was born in 1225, her father, Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec, was 20 and her mother, Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen, was 23. She married Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme in 1243. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 May 1290, in Wrocław, Lower Silesia, Poland, at the age of 65, and was buried in Wrocław, Wrocław, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix von Böhmen est née en 1225, son père, Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme en 1243. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 mai 1290, à Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Powiat wrocławski, wrocławskie, Pologne.

de.Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, G: Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix von Böhmen 1225 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec 20 und ihre Mutter Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen 23. Sie hat 1243 Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Mai 1290 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Wrocław, Niederschlesien, Polen und wurde in Powiat wrocławski, wrocławskie, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix von Böhmen è nata il nel 1225, sua padre, Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme nel 1243. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 maggio 1290, nel Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polonia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Powiat wrocławski, wrocławskie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Böhmenが1225年に生まれた時，父Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovecは20歳，母Kunigunde von Hohenstaufenは23歳であった。1243年にMarkgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Frommeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1290年5月27日にポーランドドルノsルaスキウロクlアウで65歳で死去し，ポーランドウロクlアウスキポウィアト ウロクlアウスキにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Böhmen(이)가 1225년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1243년 Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1290년 5월 27일 폴란드 도노sa스키 록l아w에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 록l아w스키 파위앳 록l아w스키에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme em 1243. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix von Böhmen родилась в 1225 г., её отцу по имени Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme в 1243 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 мая 1290 г. в местности рокlав, долноsлaски, Польша в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности поуят рокlавски, рокlавски, Польша.
